title: Crispy Bitter Eggplant Stir-fry
description: A festive Uruguayan dish featuring crispy and bitter eggplant prepared with a touch of low-fat-friendly elements for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Wash and slice the eggplant into thin strips.
Slice the onion, finely chop the garlic, and mince red pepper flakes if using.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic to the pan and cook for another minute. Stir in tomato paste and cook until fragrant, around 1-2 minutes.
Fold in salt and lemon juice, then add eggplant strips evenly over the mixture. Ensure all slices are coated with the sauce.
Sprinkle red pepper flakes if desired and stir well to combine all ingredients.
Cook for about 3-4 minutes until the eggplant is tender-crispy on the outside but still firm in the center.
Remove from heat, garnish with fresh herbs (if available) or lemon wedges, then serve hot.
